basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Engineer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 31-07-2026. In this article, you'll find the Project Engineer recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, email application procedure, and direct links to the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and relaxation criteria.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field
qualification.details: Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer position is July 31, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Engineer post at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Engineer post ranges from Rs. 31,600 to Rs. 78,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. You need to send your application to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q10. Can I find the official notification link here?
faq.answer: Yes, the official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your reference.
